chapter_title.en: The meaning of the witness and the witnessed, and the meaning of the Day for which people gather

text: : حدثنا محمد بن يحيى العطار، عن أحمد بن محمد، عن موسى بن القاسم، عن محمد بن أبي عمير، عن أبان بن عثمان، عن عبد الرحمن بن أبي عبد الله عن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام أنه قال: الشاهد يوم الجمعة والمشهود يوم عرفة والموعود يوم القيامة.

en.basel-kadem: 3.	We were told by my father, may Allah grant him mercy, that he said: We were told by Muhammed bin Yahya al-‘Attar, from Ahmad bin Muhammed, from Musa bin Qasem, from Muhammed bin Abi ‘Umayr, from Aban bin Uthman, from Abdul-Rahman bin Abi Abdillah, from Abu Abdillah, peace be upon him, that he said: The witness is Friday, that which is to be witnessed is the Day of Arafah and that which is promised is the Day of Resurrection.
